Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change
- All fees are non-refundable.
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:  Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sgp/en/aut/premium-services)  for information

Singapore Dollars only

- School pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- Researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research ( 1 );
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15-30 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least four weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.

                                                                        
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 but less than 180 days as a student, on a business trip, applicants who pick-up their residence permit in Austria, AND you are neither
                                                                            an EU nor an EFTA citizen, you need a national Austrian visitor visa (Visa D). The Visa D also entitles you to stay up to 90 days, within the validity of the Visa D, to enter
                                                                            other Schengen countries.
Embassy of Austria has decided to cooperate with an external service provider for the collection of applications while establishing the ‘one-stop’ principle for the lodging
                                                                            of applications, creates derogation from the general rule that an applicant must apply at the Austrian Visa Application Center in Singapore.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 but less than 180 days as a student, on a business trip, applicants who pick-up their residence permit in Austria, AND you are neither
                                                                            an EU nor an EFTA citizen, you need a national Austrian visitor visa (Visa D). The Visa D also entitles you to stay up to 90 days, within the validity of the Visa D, to enter
                                                                            other Schengen countries.
Embassy of Austria has decided to cooperate with an external service provider for the collection of applications while establishing the ‘one-stop’ principle for the lodging
                                                                            of applications, creates derogation from the general rule that an applicant must apply at the Austrian Visa Application Center in Singapore. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Long Term (Visa D)]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change
- All fees are non-refundable.
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:  Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sgp/en/aut/premium-services)  for information
- Photocopying
- Photo services
- Courier service
- SMS Tracking Facility

- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid by Cash or Nets
 
Singapore Dollars only
- The visa fee shall be waived for applicants belonging to one of the following categories:

- School pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- Researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research ( 1 );

## Documents Required
Please click here to download the document checklist for Visa D

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to follow the below given guidelines:
- Photograph of size 35mm x 45 mm.
- Length of the head should not exceed 30 to 36 mm in length from chin to top of hair
- Photograph must be in color with light or White background
- Photograph for each visa applicant must be an un-mounted, full face photo, color photo as described below
- Photograph must have been taken within the last six months
- One photograph needs to be submitted

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15-30 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least four weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.

                                                                        
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
 Application Form 
Document Checklist 

## To Download a Form:

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
Long Term (Visa D) (#longterm(visad))
Visa D for the applicant to stay 3 to 6 months (Study, Business Training and Approved Resident Permit)
Business Training applications will be accepted only with AMS Notification letter (Arbeitsmarktservice = regional Work Permit Department)
Short Stay -Employment(Visa C) (#shortstay(visac))
Visa C for the applicant to stay below 3 months for company training with AMS Notification letter (Arbeitsmarktservice = regional Work Permit Department)
Other Schengen visas for tourist and business trips for nationals of countries who require a visa for Austria (e.g. PR China, Thailand, Indonesia, India, etc.) please kindly contact VFS France (https://www.vfsglobal.com/France/Singapore/) website for information.
visa_types.full_text:
Long Term (Visa D) (#longterm(visad))
Visa D for the applicant to stay 3 to 6 months (Study, Business Training and Approved Resident Permit)
Business Training applications will be accepted only with AMS Notification letter (Arbeitsmarktservice = regional Work Permit Department)
Short Stay -Employment(Visa C) (#shortstay(visac))
Visa C for the applicant to stay below 3 months for company training with AMS Notification letter (Arbeitsmarktservice = regional Work Permit Department)
Other Schengen visas for tourist and business trips for nationals of countries who require a visa for Austria (e.g. PR China, Thailand, Indonesia, India, etc.) please kindly contact VFS France (https://www.vfsglobal.com/France/Singapore/) website for information.

visa_types.name: Short Stay (Visa C)
visa_types.documents_required:
Application for inter-company transfer (ICT) (for work stay in Austria up to 90 days) Visa processing period approx. 14 working days Visa application to be submitted personally, finger prints required.
                                                                        
The visa type C is for the purpose of Inter-Company Transfer for Work, not a Business visa.
Requirements
Please click here to download the document checklist for Visa C

- researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament
                                                                                            and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling
                                                                                            within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research ( 1 );
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is up to 4 weeks (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visa Type C (Short Stay – up to 90 Days)
The VFS Global Austria Visa Application Centre in Singapore only accepts Visa Type C applications for short-term company training in Austria (Short Stay – up to 90 Days).
This visa category does not cover travel for business meetings, tourism, or other short-stay purposes. To be eligible, you must have a valid AMS Notification letter issued by the Austrian company (Arbeitsmarktservice – regional work permit authority).
If you meet these conditions, you may submit your application at the VFS Global Austria Visa Application Centre in Singapore.
Tourist or Business Schengen Visas
Schengen visas for the purpose of tourism, business trips, family visits, conferences, and similar short stays cannot be applied for at the VFS Global Austria Visa Application Centre in Singapore. If you are a national of a country that requires a visa to enter the Schengen Area such as China, India, Thailand, or Indonesia) and you are travelling to Austria for one of the above purposes, please visit the *VFS France (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sgp/en/fra)* website for detailed information and application assistance.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visa Type C (Short Stay – up to 90 Days)
The VFS Global Austria Visa Application Centre in Singapore only accepts Visa Type C applications for short-term company training in Austria (Short Stay – up to 90 Days).
This visa category does not cover travel for business meetings, tourism, or other short-stay purposes. To be eligible, you must have a valid AMS Notification letter issued by the Austrian company (Arbeitsmarktservice – regional work permit authority).
If you meet these conditions, you may submit your application at the VFS Global Austria Visa Application Centre in Singapore.
Tourist or Business Schengen Visas
Schengen visas for the purpose of tourism, business trips, family visits, conferences, and similar short stays cannot be applied for at the VFS Global Austria Visa Application Centre in Singapore. If you are a national of a country that requires a visa to enter the Schengen Area such as China, India, Thailand, or Indonesia) and you are travelling to Austria for one of the above purposes, please visit the *VFS France (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sgp/en/fra)* website for detailed information and application assistance.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Short Stay (Visa C)]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change
- All fees are non-refundable.
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sgp/en/aut/premium-services) for information
- Photocopying
- Photo services
- Courier service
- SMS Tracking Facility
-  All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid by Cash or Nets Singapore Dollars only
- The visa fee shall be waived for applicants belonging to one of the following categories:
- children under six years;
- school pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament
                                                                                            and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling
                                                                                            within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research ( 1 );

## Documents Required
Application for inter-company transfer (ICT) (for work stay in Austria up to 90 days) Visa processing period approx. 14 working days Visa application to be submitted personally, finger prints required.
                                                                        
The visa type C is for the purpose of Inter-Company Transfer for Work, not a Business visa.
Requirements
Please click here to download the document checklist for Visa C

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to follow the below given guidelines:
- Photograph of size 35mm x 45 mm.
- Length of the head should not exceed 30 to 36 mm in length from chin to top of hair
- Photograph must be in color with light or White background
- Photograph for each visa applicant must be an un-mounted, full face photo, color photo as described below
- Photograph must have been taken within the last six months
- One photograph needs to be submitted

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is up to 4 weeks (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
